title: TGI Friday Copycat Jack Daniels Sauce
instructions:
In a medium sauce pot, over medium high heat, mix the water, pineapple juice, teriyaki, soy sauce and brown sugar. Bring the mixture to a boil and stir occasionally. Reduce the heat to simmer.
Add the garlic, onion, lemon juice, whiskey, crushed pineapple and pepper. Let the sauce simmer for 40-50 minutes or until reduced by half and thick.
Great on fish, chicken or beef.
